query.original: Can you use Action Surge to cast two leveled spells in one turn?
query.used: Can you use Action Surge to cast two leveled spells in one turn?

retrieved_nodes.preview:
### Action Surge

Starting at 2nd level, you can push yourself beyond your normal limits for a moment. On your turn, you can take one additional action on top of your regular action and a possible bon

### Bonus Action

A spell cast with a bonus action is especially swift. You must use a bonus action on your turn to cast the spell, provided that you haven't already taken a bonus action this turn. Yo

#### Quickened Spell

When you cast a spell that has a casting time of 1 action, you can spend 2 sorcery points to change the casting time to 1 bonus action for this casting.

If you have more than one spellcasting class, this table might give you spell slots of a level that is higher than the spells you know or can prepare. You can use those slots, but only to cast your lo

#### Flexible Casting

You can use your sorcery points to gain additional spell slots, or sacrifice spell slots to gain additional sorcery points. You learn other ways to use your sorcery points as yo

#### Empowered Spell

When you roll damage for a spell, you can spend 1 sorcery point to reroll a number of the damage dice up to your Charisma modifier (minimum of one). You must use the new rolls.

### Extra Attack

Beginning at 5th level, you can attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

answer: I cannot find this in the provided rules if a Fighter can use Action Surge to cast two leveled spells in one turn. The rules only state that a Fighter can take one additional action on top of their regular action and a possible bonus action when using Action Surge. Casting two leveled spells would require two separate actions.

correctness.feedback: The generated answer is relevant to the user query but contains inaccuracies regarding the rules. It incorrectly states that casting two leveled spells would require two separate actions without acknowledging that Action Surge allows for an additional action, which can be used to cast a second leveled spell.
